_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Erection lasting more than four hours or unrelated to sexual interest or stimulation
Rigid penile shaft, but the tip of penis (glans) is soft (Ischemic priapism)
Erect but not fully rigid penile shaft (Nonischemic priapism)

clinical_thresholds.note: as per Doppler USG, suggestive of ischemic priapism

preauth.label: Clinical notes detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, follow-up visit details, investigations, planned line of treatment and advise for procedure.
Color doppler USG of the penis and perineum report

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, follow-up visit details, investigations, planned line of treatment and advice for the procedure submitted?
Was the Doppler USG of the penis and perineum report submitted?
Was the Doppler USG of the penis suggestive of the absence of blood flow to Penis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers submitted?
Was the Detailed Procedure/Operative notes submitted?
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?
Was the Doppler USG of the penis suggestive of the absence of blood flow to Penis?

common_queries: Clinical notes for pre-authorization missing or incomplete.
Color Doppler USG of the penis and perineum report missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Doppler USG report does not indicate absence of blood flow to the penis, despite being submitted for ischemic priapism.
Detailed indoor case papers missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Detailed Procedure/Operative notes missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Detailed Discharge Summary missing or incomplete at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Surgery for Priapism only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation
